stories.name: delivery-order-tracking
stories.title: Add delivery order tracking and use it in handle_accept
stories.description: Add _delivery_order list to MessageHandler, populate it in _assign_image_index (which is called immediately before the IMAGE_READY event is sent), use it in handle_accept instead of sorted(index_map.keys()), and clear it alongside other state after accept.
stories.notes: Single atomic change to handler.py - add field, populate it, use it, clear it
